allow: Bash(wsl -e bash -c "ps aux | grep -E 'Xvfb|x11vnc|websockify|openbox|fluxbox' | grep -v grep; echo '---LOGS---'; cat /home/vu/toolsauto/x11vnc.log 2>/dev/null | tail -20; echo '---WEBSOCKIFY---'; cat /home/vu/toolsauto/websockify.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10")

Bash(wsl -e bash -c "DISPLAY=:99 xdpyinfo 2>&1 | grep -E 'screen|dimensions|depth' | head -5; echo '---'; ps aux | grep -E 'DISPLAY|openbox|fluxbox|xterm|chrome|chromium|playwright' | grep -v grep | head -10")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "which openbox fluxbox xfwm4 matchbox-window-manager 2>&1; dpkg -l | grep -E 'openbox|fluxbox|xfwm|matchbox' 2>/dev/null | head -10")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'openbox|fluxbox|xfwm|matchbox|twm|fvwm|xterm|x11-apps'; echo '---'; which xterm xclock xsetroot 2>&1")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "dpkg -l openbox 2>/dev/null; apt-cache show openbox 2>/dev/null | head -5; which xsetroot; DISPLAY=:99 xsetroot -solid '#2d2d2d' 2>&1")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "sudo apt-get install -y openbox 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "which openbox 2>&1 && echo 'openbox installed' || echo 'not yet'")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "which openbox 2>&1 && echo OK || echo MISSING")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "DISPLAY=:99 nohup openbox > /tmp/openbox.log 2>&1 & sleep 2 && pgrep -x openbox && echo 'openbox running' || echo 'openbox failed'")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "which xterm 2>&1; DISPLAY=:99 xterm &disown; sleep 1; echo done")
Bash(wsl -e bash -c "cat /tmp/openbox.log 2>/dev/null; ps aux | grep openbox | grep -v grep")
